RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/oracle/crsp_read_dbtablename_cc.oracle
RuleSet.GenRule: open retCursor for select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ order by ClassCode asc;

if( isSystemUser = 1 ) then open retCursor for select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ order by ClassCode asc; else open retCursor for select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$$implOracleSPReadTableRetSelectAndRestrictCluster$ order by ClassCode asc; end if;

if( isSystemUser = 1 ) then open retCursor for select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ order by ClassCode asc; else open retCursor for select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$$implOracleSPReadTableRetSelectAndRestrictTenant$ order by ClassCode asc; end if;
